nuggets.idea_one_liner: Relationships act as the 'drums' that reveal when your spiritual tempo is off.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Uses a musical analogy to show that isolation hides flaws, while connection exposes where we aren't synced with God.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Clarity in spiritual focus through relationship friction.
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: High, uses a relatable musical framework.
denominator_notes: Requires staying in the friction rather than running.

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: If you're playing solo, you can't tell when you're slightly off tempo because there's nobody playing the drums. As soon as you start playing the drums, you realize when your tempo's off, which makes you a better musician. It's the same thing with marriage.
proof_anchor_lines: The drums of relationship expose your rhythm
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: Why staying single might be hiding your biggest spiritual flaws.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: The musician who thinks he's in time until the drummer starts.
nuggets.hook_angle_3_mechanism: The 'Tempo Test' for your relationship with Christ.
nuggets.enemy_frame_proof_redacted: If you're playing solo, you can't tell when you're slightly off tempo
nuggets.first_step_seed: Stop avoiding the person who triggers your 'off-tempo' behavior; look at what it reveals about your focus on God.
must_not_claim: That friction equals a bad match

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You don't choose a partner without problems; you choose whose problems you are built to handle.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Destroys the 'perfect partner' myth and replaces it with a mission-oriented 'helper' framework.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Peace in the choice of a partner despite their flaws.
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: High, shifts burden from finding perfection to finding alignment.
numerator_notes: Exposes the idol of the 'Perfect Woman'

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: It's a question of are the problems of choosing this lifestyle problems that you're willing to take on? Every girl has problems. Every girl has difficulties. That's part of being human.
proof_anchor_lines: The girl without problems doesn't exist
You were built to handle a specific set of difficulties
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: Stop looking for the woman without baggage. She’s not real.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: The man waiting for a perfect partner who will never arrive.
nuggets.enemy_frame_proof_redacted: Every girl has problems. Every girl has difficulties.
nuggets.first_step_seed: List your partner's problems. Ask God: 'Am I built to handle these?'
